source_notes: Spec target: full 2025 ICLR public OpenReview corpus.
ICLR is treated as fully open public review scope; API probe confirms concrete review availability once OpenReview auth/challenge is satisfied.
Spec target: public ICML 2025 reviews, accepted plus public opt-in rejected papers where visible.
ICML is treated as partial public review scope; API probe determines exact public coverage after OpenReview auth/challenge is satisfied.
Spec target: public NeurIPS 2025 reviews, accepted plus public opt-in rejected papers where visible.
NeurIPS is treated as partial public review scope; API probe determines exact public coverage after OpenReview auth/challenge is satisfied.
Rolling OpenReview journal: pull all public submissions, then filter by 2025 decision/activity.
Second-round probe confirms public replies exist on older/decided submissions, but latest under-review submissions have no public replies.
TMLR needs a rolling extractor that filters decided/activity-2025 submissions and reads paper-level Official_Comment threads.
Probe on 2026-07-08 found public official reviews on colmweb.org/COLM/2025/Conference/-/Submission: 20/20 sampled papers, 75 reviews.

Recheck on 2026-07-08: AISTATS.cc Submission/Post_Submission returned 0 papers; aistats.org/AISTATS Submission/Post_Submission each sampled 50 papers with 0 replies and 0 official reviews. Mark excluded until public official reviews become visible.
Recheck on 2026-07-08: auai.org/UAI/2025/Conference/-/Submission sampled 50 papers with 0 public official reviews. Mark excluded until public official reviews become visible.

Recheck on 2026-07-08: robot-learning.org/CoRL/2025/Conference/-/Submission sampled 50 papers and 50 decision replies with 0 public official reviews. Mark excluded until public official reviews become visible.
Second-round probe found public reviews on MIDL.io/2025/Conference/-/Post_Submission.
Sample of 50 submissions returned 163 public reviews with 100% sample coverage.
Top ML journal tracked for scope control; no public OpenReview official-review corpus is expected for 2025 scoring.
Top AI journal tracked for scope control; no public OpenReview official-review corpus is expected for 2025 scoring.
Top ML journal tracked for scope control; no public OpenReview official-review corpus is expected for 2025 scoring.

notes: Authoritative for current local 2025 OpenReview ingestion status. TMLR is scored via rolling decision/activity extractor, not invitation sample probe. Excluded venues have no public official-review evidence in current probes or are not OpenReview-public journals.
